calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-17-2022 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2021 Set For Trial On Feb-22-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2021 Continued To May-12-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, From Defendant 75 Howard Owner Lp, A Delaware Limited Partnership, To Determine All Objections Waived, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-11-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs DWIGHT NELSON and ROBYN NELSON's Motion To Compel Answers To Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, From Defendant 75 Howard Owner LP, A Delaware Limited Partnership, To Determine All Objections Waived, And For Monetary Sanctions:

The Nelsons' motion is GRANTED as follows:

75 Howard Owner, LP shall serve verified code-compliant amended responses without objections, including ones based on privilege or the protection of attorney work product, to the Nelsons' Form Interrogatories (Set 1) and Request for Production of Documents (Set 1) by March 25, 2021. The term "code-compliant" means in compliance with the California Civil Discovery Act, Code of Civil Procedure sections 2016.010 et seq., as interpreted by the decisions of the courts of this state, including, without limitation, the case decisions cited in the Nelsons' moving papers. 75 Howard Owner, LP shall produce all responsive documents within its possession, custody or control by March 25, 2021.

The Nelsons are awarded monetary sanctions of $500.00, and 75 Howard Owner, LP shall deliver payment in that amount to the Nelsons' counsel of record by April 11, 2021.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Vestal, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2021 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-13-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
